verdict.summary: This repo is reviveable, but 2 high-severity issue(s) should be handled before feature work.

docs.title: Stalled Notes App
docs.content:
# Stalled Notes App

A small note-taking app for developers who want a local scratchpad beside their editor.

## Setup

Run `npm install` and then `npm run dev`.

The dashboard screenshot lives at `docs/dashboard.png`.

docs.title: Status
docs.content:
# Status

The sync feature was planned but never started.

summary.claimedValue: A small note-taking app for developers who want a local scratchpad beside their editor.

findings.title: Project identity: Stalled Notes App
findings.body: A small note-taking app for developers who want a local scratchpad beside their editor.

evidence.excerpt: A small note-taking app for developers who want a local scratchpad beside their editor.

findings.title: No git history was available
findings.body: The analyzer could not read commit history for this local path.

findings.title: README references missing npm script: npm run dev
findings.body: The setup instructions mention `npm run dev`, but package.json does not define a "dev" script.

findings.title: Dependencies exist without a lockfile
findings.body: The project declares npm dependencies but does not include a recognized lockfile, so installs may drift.

findings.title: No npm test script is defined
findings.body: The package has scripts, but no standard local validation command.

findings.title: Source code exists without a visible test surface
findings.body: The repository has source files, but no test files or configured validation command were detected.

findings.title: Documented file is missing: docs/dashboard.png
findings.body: Documentation references `docs/dashboard.png`, but that file was not found in the repository snapshot.

stallHypotheses.title: The project likely stalled around reproducibility and validation
stallHypotheses.rationale: The highest severity findings point to setup instructions or local validation being unreliable.

stallHypotheses.title: The documentation may have drifted away from the actual repository
stallHypotheses.rationale: The docs reference files or surfaces that are absent from the inspected file tree.

revivalTasks.title: Make setup reproducible
revivalTasks.rationale: Fix the setup and install risks before adding product behavior.
revivalTasks.expectedResult: Dependencies install from a lockfile and the documented build command works.

revivalTasks.title: Restore a local validation command
revivalTasks.rationale: A revival needs one command that proves the current baseline.
revivalTasks.expectedResult: A repeatable test command exists and reports a clear result.

revivalTasks.title: Clean stale public documentation
revivalTasks.rationale: Portfolio or handoff readers should not hit missing files from the README.
revivalTasks.verificationCommand: Search README and docs links for missing local references
revivalTasks.expectedResult: Documented files either exist or the references are removed.

EV-001.excerpt: A small note-taking app for developers who want a local scratchpad beside their editor.
